name: PC Deals Script: August 24-31, 2002
description: Peter: With three weeks to go in the back-to-school promotion season, the market is in the midst of adding enormous technology bang for the buyer's buck. Pentium 4 2.53 GHz high-end microprocessors, too expensive for PC Deals' mass-market focus to date, exploded onto our radar screen, while 2.26 GHz machines are now under $900. All this at www.aberdeen.com/pcdeals.
